description: Shared reusable-workflows repo. Inherits the canonical rknightion/m7kni Renovate standard (renovate-config.json in this repo): hash-pinned Actions treated as immutable SHAs, 2-day cooldown, non-major automerge on green self-CI. Only the repo-specific GoReleaser-version tracker lives here.

customManagers.description: Track the GoReleaser CLI version pinned as the binaries.yml goreleaser-version input default.
